name: Parsleyed New Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub unpared potatoes lightly with vegetable brush.
2. Heat 2 inches of salted water to boiling. Add potatoes. Cover; heat to boiling.
3. Cook until tender, 20 to 25 minutes.
4. Drain.
5. Add butter; toss until potatoes are covered.
6. Sprinkle with parsley and serve.
